activated_rules.rule_name: Goods description verification priority using article number
Quantity verification against total weight in invoice
Origin country normalization and equivalent matching
EU origin normalization and multiple origin handling

consignor.invoice_value:
SKF Eurotrade AB
415 50 Goteborg, Sweden
SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'SKF Eurotrade AB' in certificate identified exactly in invoice header and address blocks with allowed normalizations (versals, spacing, company suffix). Country 'Sweden' matches exactly after normalization. No contradictions found.

consignee.certificate_value:
Technotorg-Don LLC
Heroiv Ukrainy avenue, 113/1
54025 Mykolaiv
UKRAINE
consignee.invoice_value:
MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC
210, Lev Tolstoy Str.
720031 Bishkek
KYRGYZSTAN
consignee.motivation: Consignee in certificate 'Technotorg-Don LLC' not found in invoice. Invoice consignee is 'MIR PODSHIPNIKOV LLC' with address in Kyrgyzstan, differing from certificate consignee in Ukraine. No match or allowed normalization possible.

goods_description.certificate_value:
WATER PUMP,WHEEL BEARING KIT,OTH KIT COMPONENTS,
SUSPENSION TRACK CONTROL ARM BUSH
goods_description.invoice_value: NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, SPHERICAL ROLLER BRG, CYLINDRICAL ROLLER BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG OD > 30 MM, FITTING CAPS OF PLASTIC, ROLLER CHAINS, RADIAL SHAFT SEALS, LINKS FOR CHAINS, NUTS
goods_description.motivation: Certificate goods description and invoice goods descriptions differ significantly. No exact article numbers present in certificate to verify via priority 1. Textual match fails. Due to different terminology and partial overlap in product types, result requires manual review.

quantity.certificate_value:
GW in KGS
844,96
NW in KGS
714,30
quantity.invoice_value:
Total Gross Weight 171,55 KG
Total Net Weight 125,20 KG
quantity.motivation: Certificate gross and net weights (844.96 KG GW, 714.30 KG NW) do not match invoice total weights (171.55 KG GW, 125.20 KG NW). Differences exceed allowed tolerances. This is a clear quantitative mismatch.

origin.invoice_value: Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States
origin.motivation: Certificate origin countries (Germany, Spain, Italy, Turkey, China, Taiwan) cannot be fully matched in invoice origin countries (Slovakia, Sweden, Germany, France, India, China, United States). Spain, Italy, Turkey, Taiwan from certificate origin not found in invoice. This is a mismatch.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Consignor matches, but consignee, goods description, quantity and origin exhibit clear mismatches or uncertainties requiring manual handling.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Consignornamnet kan verifieras mot fakturan, men mottagaren skiljer sig mellan certifikat och faktura. Varubeskrivningen i certifikatet matchar inte varorna i fakturan. Kvantiteterna i certifikatet överensstämmer inte med fakturans totalvikter. Ursprungslandet i certifikatet stämmer inte med de som anges i fakturan.
